_comment: Hand-derived (implementation-plan.md fixtures rule, WP-11), same envelope assumption as steps.json (see its _comment). Run VO2 Max is a distinct Google type from plain VO2 Max (base-knowledge.md §3) but base-knowledge.md §5 maps both to the same HealthKit identifier, HKQuantityTypeIdentifierVO2Max -- SyncKit's TypeMapper.decideVO2Max handles both Google types in one function. Value key `run_vo2_max.value` (field name assumed, consistent with vo2-max.json). Mirrored in SyncKit's TypeMapperFixtures.vo2MaxPoint(id: "run-vo2-0001", dataType: .runVO2Max, value: 45.1).
